race.comment: PEAR BELLINI (10) finds the maiden win elusive but it certainly hasn't been without trying. Cherry-ripe now and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside. Doesn't need to improve much to finally get off the mark this time. MY SWEETHEART (9) is mixing her form but has good early toe and is drawn to advantage. Expect her to bounce straight to the front and give a bold sight. KING COUNTRY (4) was good here first-up when closing off nicely into the placings. Didn't fire a shot last time at Ipswich in a flat effort but gets his chance to bounce back third-up. Don't underestimate. WARM FRONT (6) gave backers a sight at Muswellbrook last time in testing conditions but couldn't go with an impressive winner. Rock-hard fit and in the mix.
